title: Switch
description: Binary on/off toggle for immediate settings. Prefer <button role="switch"> or checkbox semantics depending on implementation constraints.

states.name: checked
effects: Track uses accent color; thumb moves to on position.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

keyboard: Space toggles when focused (common switch behavior).
Tab focuses the switch; Shift+Tab reverses.
aria: If not using a native checkbox, use role="switch" and set aria-checked to true/false.
Provide an accessible name via associated label or aria-label.

must: Switch must clearly communicate on/off state via position and/or icon/text.
should: Use switch for immediate settings; use checkbox for multi-select in forms.
must_not: Do not use switch for navigation or mutually exclusive options.

token_usage.notes: Use accent color in on state.
Use muted surface for off state.
